series_metadata.series_title: Trainings, Presentations, Education Reporting and Credit Reviews
series_metadata.series_description: All materials related to the review and approval/denial of Fiscal Integrity Act, CPIM, and County Treasurer education credits including, but not limited to, speaker and topic details, hours submitted for consideration, and application for credit approval communications. All LGS training and presentation materials including, but not limited to, sponsor invitations, staff assignments, topic identification, agendas, workshop summaries, handouts, and PowerPoints. County Treasurer presentation/education will maintain the same as information as above, with the addition of specific reviews for biannual conferences, miscellaneous association meetings, small presentations, and stand-alone online workshops consistent with ORC § 321.46. County Treasurer attendee credit application forms, e-mails and reports are also maintained in this series.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: while needed ; Electronic: from presentation date
